name: Easy Chicken Cacciatore
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into thin strips.
2. Cut the mushrooms, sweet peppers, and green pepper into thin strips.
3. Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add red pepper flakes and stir until fragrant.
4. Add chicken to the pot and sauté for 5 minutes or until golden brown. Remove chicken with a slotted spoon and set aside.
5. Add mushrooms and sauté for 4-5 minutes or until tender. Stir in spaghetti sauce, sweet peppers, green pepper, thyme, and vinegar.
6. Return chicken to the pot. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 8-10 minutes or until peppers are just tender, stirring occasionally.
7. Serve over hot cooked spaghetti or linguini.
